calendar.matters:
REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2363 28th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Apr-25-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

The sale was confirmed at $1,400,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed March 14, 2019. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions Re: Sale Of Trust Real Property
Off Calendar Mar-18-2019 Off Calendar

Petition For Instructions Re: Sale Of Trust Real Property
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Continued To Mar-18-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions Re: Sale Of Trust Real Property
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Advanced From Feb-25-19 To Feb-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions Re: Sale Of Trust Real Property
Off Calendar Feb-04-2019 Continued To Mar-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Successor Trustee).
Ziyad Hannon (Heir) in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it wants to make sure everyone got notice. Mr. Der stated that there are four children, that the fifth child is predeceased, but survived by a child, and that John is only getting a watch. Mr. Hannon stated that he filed his objections this morning (courtesy copy provided in open court). Mr. Der stated that he just received the objections, that he needs instruction from the Court, that the agreement did not have reference to the reverse mortgage and that they would need to borrow 100% of the property to do distribution. Mr. Hannon provided family history, stated that there was an agreement between the siblings with respect to the property, spoke of the sentimental value of his Mother's house, and expressed concern about the house being sold with Court confirmation and over bidders. Mr. Der stated that Ms. Hannon was not a signatory to the agreement, that the agreement was not referenced to in the restatement, that his Client needs to deal with the reverse mortgage lender, that a notice of default has not been recorded yet and that he can not enforce the terms of a settlement that they were not a party to. The Petition for Instructions Re: Sale of Trust Real Property is continued to March 11, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Ex Parte Application For Order Shortening Time And Advancing Hearing Date For Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Granted Per Written Order
